floor_history.headline: fable-blitz recon: sll/sra sign-extension is REAL in target (sra in jal delay slot); the (s16) cast is a redundant SPELLING under the s32 proto — s16-proto swap should be byte-neutral ordinary cleanup

frontier.hypothesis: Change the 12013 proto to `void func_80087F64(s16);` and drop the cast at 12269 (`func_80087F64(v)`) — expect byte-identical output (floor stays 0)
frontier.mechanism: prototype-driven narrow-argument conversion emits the same sign_extend(subreg:HI) RTL as the explicit cast; sched fills the jal delay slot with the sra identically
frontier.next_probe: sandbox GetAllocPacketSize --disable all with the proto+cast edit; expect 0, then verify-oracle/retire for the unmasked proof

frontier.hypothesis: If the s16 proto perturbs anything (decl-conflict diagnostics or RTL difference), use the TU's own K&R spelling: `extern void func_80087F64();` (no proto) + keep `(s16)v` — under no-proto the cast IS semantically meaningful (determines the promoted value), matching the line-12592 precedent, so it is not the flagged redundant-cast family
frontier.mechanism: K&R default argument promotion of an s16 value emits the identical sll/sra pair; the cast has semantic purpose under this decl so it passes the human-programmer test
frontier.next_probe: sandbox with the no-proto spelling; expect 0

frontier.hypothesis: Cleanup adjacency: the sibling call at 12316 carries the same redundant cast UNDER an s16 proto (12300) — same-commit cleanup candidate if its bytes are cast-invariant
frontier.mechanism: cast-to-declared-type is a no-op conversion; dropping it should be RTL-identical
frontier.next_probe: sandbox the owning function of line 12316 with the cast dropped; expect 0 (separate function, verify ownership first)

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): CODEGEN-CAST CHEAT at text1b.c:12269: func_80087F64((s16)v) forces a sign-extension pair (sll/sra in the jal delay slot) with no semantic purpose. Visible proto at line 12013 is void func_80087F64(s32); v is always in [1,46] so (s16)v==v. Three other call sites with the same s32 proto and runtime variable args (lines 12523, 12643, 12662) omit the cast. Worker redo: declare func_80087F64 as s16 consistently so GCC emits sign-extension naturally via integer promotion, then drop the explicit cast; confirm with retire/verify-oracle.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
